backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a couples' letter journal with user profiles, partner pairing, draft/published letter management, and access control via mixins for authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (romantic theme, public access, read-more expansion, etc.) to their associated source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title and mounting the React root div with the main module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component using TanStack Router with four routes: public feed (open), editor (open to all), and my-letters/settings (auth-protected), plus a profile setup dialog for newly authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button component using Internet Identity with rose-themed styling, handling login errors and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog prompting newly authenticated users to enter their display name, with romantic heart icon styling and a save profile mutation.
frontend/src/components/auth/RequireAuth: Authentication guard component that renders children for authenticated users or displays a centered login-prompt card with a lock icon for unauthenticated visitors.
Main layout wrapper providing a sticky header with navigation links, mobile nav, user profile display, login button, and a paper-texture background with a footer containing social links.
frontend/src/components/letters/LetterCa: Displays a published letter as a styled card with title, author, date, and an expandable body supporting a 'Read More/Less' toggle for long content.
frontend/src/components/letters/Visibili: Renders a small badge indicating whether a letter is public or private, using an eye icon and appropriate styling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile, partner, drafts, and letter CRUD operations (fetch, save, publish, update).
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base styles, CSS custom properties for a romantic light/dark color palette, and utility classes for gradients and typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/LetterEditorPage.tsx: A React page component for creating and editing love letters, supporting save-as-draft, publish, and update-published workflows with title, body, and visibility fields.
frontend/src/pages/MyLettersPage.tsx: A React page that displays the authenticated user's draft and published letter, with navigation buttons to create or edit letters.
frontend/src/pages/PublicFeedPage.tsx: A React page showing a hero banner and a paginated feed of public love letters fetched from the backend, with an empty-state prompt to write the first letter.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPartnerPage.t: A React settings page that allows an authenticated user to link their account to a partner by entering and validating the partner's Principal ID.
frontend/src/utils/principal.ts: Utility function that parses a text string into a Dfinity Principal, returning a typed result object with success status and error message.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with optional sessionStorage persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining a romantic theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), fonts (Lato, Playfair Display, Dancing Script), border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations including accordion and fade-in effects.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 3) for a romantic couples' letter-writing app, documenting existing features (romantic theme, public letters access, inline read-more, hero image) and new feature requests with their implementation status.
